title: MSPs to Vote on US Military Use of Scottish Airports

sections.heading: Legislative Vote Scheduled
sections.content: The vote is focused on US military usage of Prestwick Airport amid reports of military operations involving US troops.

sections.heading: Concerns Raised
sections.content: The motion reflects concerns among MSPs regarding the continued presence and activities of US forces at the airport.

sections.heading: Implications of the Vote
sections.content: If passed, the motion would effectively prevent US military personnel from utilizing Prestwick Airport for their operations.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – MSPs to vote on banning Donald Trump's troops from using Scottish airports
